title: Vanilla Improved
description: Improved Vanilla enhances Minecraft with better visuals, animations, and gameplay tweaks while preserving the classic vanilla feel.
body:
The "Improved Vanilla" modpack is perfect for players who love the original Minecraft experience but want it to feel more polished and immersive. This modpack focuses on quality-of-life improvements without straying far from the vanilla vibe.

Key features include 3D skin layers, animated items, enhanced block-breaking particles, a refined mount HUD, and realistic creeper behavior. With these subtle but impactful upgrades, you can enjoy Minecraft with improved visuals, better animations, and smoother gameplay, all while keeping the charm of the original game.

Dive into a world that feels familiar yet refreshed with "Improved Vanilla"!
